description: A journalist is filing a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request for emails from the mayor's office.

nodes.task_description: Receive and log the FOIA request, noting the date and the specific records requested.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully logs the incoming request and assigns it a tracking number.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge receipt of the request to the journalist and provide the legally mandated response timeline.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a formal acknowledgement to the requestor.

nodes.task_description: Forward the request to the appropriate department (mayor's office) and the legal team to begin the document search and review.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly routes the request to the responsible parties.
